hero.title: Every student deserves a guide who's been there
hero.subtitle: Connect with verified student counsellors from Harvard, Stanford, MIT and more — people who navigated the same journey from your country.

howItWorks.title: How PathPal Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get matched with the right counsellor in minutes

browse.title: Browse & Filter
browse.desc: Filter by country, language, and specialty to find counsellors who understand your background

match.title: Read Their Story
match.desc: Every counsellor shares their personal journey — find someone whose path resonates with yours

book.title: Book a Session
book.desc: Choose a time that works for your timezone

start.title: Start Your Journey
start.desc: Video session with your counsellor — guidance from someone who's been there

forParents.title: For Parents
forParents.subtitle: World-class guidance at a fraction of traditional costs
forParents.insight: The most relevant advice comes from students already inside your child's dream school — not career advisors who graduated 20 years ago.

safe.title: Is it safe?
safe.desc: Every counsellor is verified with enrollment proof and government ID before their first session. You see exactly who is guiding your child.

worth.title: Is it worth it?
worth.desc: From $35/session vs. $15,000–$25,000 for a traditional agency package. Same outcome, dramatically less cost.

effective.title: Will it actually work?
effective.desc: Our counsellors got into Harvard, Stanford, and MIT as international students — the exact same journey your child is on.

forParents.trust: All counsellors are verified with enrollment proof and government ID.

forum.title: Community Forum
forum.subtitle: Questions, stories and advice from international applicants worldwide
forum.verificationNotice: You need to be a verified counsellor to post.

onboarding.country: Which country are you applying from?
